summary: Finished the bounded operational hardening for the private specbridge-v2 repository. The v2 repo now has a minimal read-only GitHub Actions CI workflow, operational docs, style guide, an operational-hardening contract and scope, updated agent policy, updated current-goal/protected-file context, and additive tests. The v2 hardening commit eb9507c4e87b89d2695e64157d12ff3d883f8a57 was pushed to origin/master and GitHub Actions CI passed. Branch protection was attempted but GitHub returned 403 requiring GitHub Pro or public visibility, so that item remains blocked by billing/visibility policy.

policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #257 contract except for branch protection, which was attempted and blocked by GitHub billing/private visibility. The work did not access secrets, install dependencies, change production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtimes, external AI providers, mutation-capable MCP, cleanup enforcement, or repository visibility. No force push or branch deletion was performed.
risk_result: High-risk CI work was bounded to a read-only workflow that runs the existing PowerShell 5.1 test suite. Residual risk remains because branch protection cannot be enabled on the private repository without GitHub Pro or public visibility.
unresolved_risks: specbridge-v2 master is not branch-protected because GitHub returned HTTP 403: Upgrade to GitHub Pro or make this repository public.
The v1 evidence branch is still local and not merged into main.
The v2 CI workflow uses actions/checkout@v4 rather than a pinned action SHA; this is acceptable for the current MVP but should be revisited under a future CI hardening contract.
merge_status: Not merged into v1 main. V1 evidence remains on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment was requested or performed.
